scenario: HELIX adapter /helix/metrics capture with helix_msgs sourced
expected_effect: Capture adapter-derived metrics from live GO2 observation
observed_effect: 3788 /helix/metrics messages captured at ~50 Hz from passive adapter. Metrics include topic rates, GNSS fields, pose drift, and GO2 state.
supports_claim: HELIX adapter produces continuous telemetry stream from standard GO2 topics without modifying robot software
notes: Adapter-only session (no HELIX detector nodes). HELIX detector was run separately in EXP-13.
